title: Exploit Modification Guide
when_to_use: When public exploits need target adaptation

steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Download exploit code from ExploitDB matching target application and version
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for exploit modification guide
steps.expected_output: Local copy of exploit code ready for modification

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Thoroughly read entire exploit code to understand functionality and vulnerabilities
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: Complete understanding of exploit logic, payload delivery, and execution method

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Identify variables requiring modification for target environment (URLs, ports, paths)
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Annotated list of variables needing target-specific adjustments

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Create backup copy of original exploit before making any modifications
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Saved backup preserving original exploit for reference

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Modify all target-specific values including IPs, ports, credentials, and paths
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: Updated exploit with all necessary target-environment variables configured

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Test modified exploit in safe lab environment before production use
steps.expected_output: Confirmed working exploit successfully exploiting target in controlled environment

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Document all modifications with comments and separate notes for reference
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Modified exploit with inline documentation of all changes made
